overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban waterfront promenade. The character moves from a covered concrete walkway through open plazas with palm trees, past a distinctive yellow transit building, and finally to the water's edge with flooded structures visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under massive concrete structure

events.description: approaching the end of the covered walkway, transitioning toward open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway beneath massive concrete building, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and red hair walking toward camera

entered.detail: futuristic brutalist building with geometric support columns and dark facade
wide paved pedestrian path with large square tiles
tall palm trees lining the distant waterfront
futuristic black utility vehicle parked near the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian area beneath a massive concrete building with distinctive geometric architecture. The walkway is wide and paved, with palm trees visible in the distance and a black van parked to the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the lighting is diffused by the overhead cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with seating and police barriers near waterfront

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit plaza with seating areas
passes through area cordoned off with yellow police tape barriers

agents.ego_description: exiting covered area and crossing open plaza with police barriers, passing seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of four pedestrians sitting on concrete benches

entered.detail: yellow and black caution tape strung between barriers blocking off section of plaza
modern concrete bench structures with people seated
distinctive yellow and black futuristic transit building with curved roof

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright open plaza. Yellow police tape barriers block off a section of the area, while several pedestrians sit on concrete benches to the right. In the distance, a distinctive yellow transit station becomes visible as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with transit station and landscaped greenery

events.description: slight turn left while passing the yellow transit building

agents.ego_description: walking along promenade passing the yellow transit building and landscaped grass areas

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
raised rectangular beds with green grass and small palm trees
stairs leading down to underground metro station entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide promenade with the yellow transit station now prominent in the center view. To the left, digital billboards and landscaped grass planters line the path, while stairs lead down to a metro entrance. The area is moderately busy with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with market stalls and modern commercial buildings

events.description: entering area with colorful market stalls and increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: walking through busy plaza passing market stalls on the left and modern buildings

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at colorful market stall with red and yellow awning

entered.detail: colorful vendor stalls with awnings and signage
tall commercial building with reflective glass windows
short black posts with yellow reflective stripes lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a bustling open plaza with colorful market stalls lining the left side. Modern glass buildings rise nearby, and black bollards with yellow stripes mark the walkway edges. The yellow transit station recedes into the background as the character progresses toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront edge with view of flooded urban structures

events.description: reaches water's edge with view of flooded buildings and distant structures

agents.ego_description: walking to the waterfront edge and looking out at the water and flooded structures

entered.detail: calm water surface with reflections of distant structures
partially submerged concrete buildings and platforms in the water
tall vertical digital advertisement display near waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the waterfront edge, leaving the busy plaza behind. The view opens to reveal a body of water with flooded concrete structures and buildings partially submerged in the distance. A digital signage kiosk stands to the left as the camera pans to take in the waterfront vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a sprawling, sunlit waterfront promenade. It begins beneath the diffused light of a massive concrete building, moving past a parked black van and pedestrians along a wide, paved path. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a bright plaza marked by yellow police tape and concrete benches, with a distinctive yellow transit station appearing in the distance. The camera then progresses along a landscaped promenade lined with digital billboards and metro stairs, shifting through a bustling market area with colorful stalls and glass buildings. Finally, the urban density recedes as the character reaches the water's edge, where the view expands to reveal a vista of partially submerged concrete structures in the distance.
